company_name: LS / Daehan Cable / Gaon Cable / Poongsan copper-grid basket
notes: Copper AI-grid is a real macro bottleneck, but Korean individual wires/processors need order backlog, pass-through, OPM, and FCF before Stage 3.

company_name: Poongsan copper processing plus defense event
notes: Poongsan is the clean R4 training case: copper plus ammo can reach Stage 2, but M&A rumor must unwind when review is dropped and sale is denied.

company_name: OCI Holdings non-China polysilicon / SpaceX talks
notes: OCI non-China polysilicon can route research, but SpaceX talks are not Stage 3 without confirmed amount, period, volume, ASP, and OPM.

company_name: POSCO Holdings / Hyundai Steel / KG Steel tariff directionality
notes: Steel tariff scoring must split China-only tariffs from all-import tariffs. Directionality is the evidence, not the word tariff.
SeAH Steel is the clean price-path 4C check: a direct tariff hit matters more than generic steel price upside.

company_name: SeAH specialty steel US localization option
notes: US localization can reduce tariff risk, but Stage 3 needs local revenue, margin, OP/EPS, and FCF.

company_name: POSCO Holdings / Kumyang / Hydro Lithium / Union Materials / Tplex price-only themes
notes: Lithium and rare-earth Korea themes stay Stage 1/4B-watch before actual offtake, production, revenue, and FCF.

company_name: Union Materials / Tplex / EG rare-earth theme
notes: Rare-earth keyword exposure can route research but cannot become Stage 3 without revenue, offtake, and FCF.

company_name: Lotte Fine Chemical / Hanwha Solutions / OCI chemical spread watch
notes: Chemical spread recovery must show durable spread, volume, OPM, and FCF before Stage 3.
OpenDART list or media headline is not enough; missing counterparty, amount, period, volume, price floor, or margin caps Stage 3.
